# Client Koi

> Client Koi is a free, open-source Chrome extension that extracts B2B leads from Google Maps. It scrapes verified email addresses, phone numbers, websites, and social media profiles from local business listings — then exports everything to CSV or Excel for CRM import.

## Features
- Deep contact scraping: visits linked business websites to find hidden emails and social profiles
- 2Captcha integration: automated CAPTCHA bypass for uninterrupted overnight scraping sessions
- Anti-ban mechanics: humanized mouse movements, scrolling patterns, and randomized delays
- One-click CRM export: download compiled lead lists as CSV or XLSX
- Smart tag system: search by niche, location, and keyword combinations

## Use Cases
- Digital marketing agencies building outreach lists
- Freelancers prospecting for new clients
- Sales teams generating B2B lead databases
- Real estate agents finding local business contacts
- Startups validating market size in specific regions
